title: Spalien Acecraft Speaningless Moonerisms
description: Fourteen years after their official final gig, Spalien Acecraft are back on planet Earth with their unique streak of interactive intergalactic latter-day cabaret for pop-sensible extra-terrestrials. Featuring original celestial minstrel Johnny Acecraft, three authenticated relations and one tolerated acquaintance: sisters Maliniverse and The Elbot on harmonies harvested from shared childhoods and questionable life choices, wife Jopiter on genuine musical talent, and key-stabber extraordinaire Nathanova. The band will emulate their past daftness with favourites including Orange for a Head, Man with the Magical Armpits, Speedy Bikini and more, and they may also get round to writing some new stuff. Audience participation will be gently encouraged and enthusiastically misinterpreted. Bring your offspring: the band will censor their extremest egregiousnesses. This is a pay-what-you-can, bequeath-what-you-believe, share-what-you-dare affair before they re-disappear into the shimmery nowhere.
